jobs.name: argo-daily-discovery
jobs.description: Daily creator discovery: rotates platforms, searches 2-3 hashtags, discovers up to 10 creators, auto-qualifies

payload.message: Run argo-discover to find new creators. Rotate to the next platform in the sequence. Search 2-3 hashtags. After discovery, run argo-qualify to score all unscored creators. Report results.

jobs.name: argo-followup-check-am
jobs.description: Morning follow-up check: drafts follow-ups for due creators, announces for approval

payload.message: Run argo-followup to check for creators due for follow-up messages. Draft follow-ups for any that are due. Announce drafts for user approval. Do not send without approval.

jobs.name: argo-followup-check-pm
jobs.description: Evening follow-up check: drafts follow-ups for due creators, announces for approval

payload.message: Run argo-followup to check for creators due for follow-up messages. Draft follow-ups for any that are due. Announce drafts for user approval. Do not send without approval.

jobs.name: argo-weekly-report
jobs.description: Monday morning pipeline report: full summary saved to pipeline-reports/

payload.message: Run argo-pipeline to generate a full weekly report. Save the report to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/pipeline-reports/ with filename format week-WW-YYYY.md. Announce the summary.

jobs.name: argo-seo-blog-weekly
jobs.description: Generate 2-3 blog posts from keyword queue targeting photography business keywords

payload.message: Run argo-seo-content to generate 2-3 blog posts. Read keyword-research.json from ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/ and select the next high-priority keywords with status 'not_started'. Generate Markdown blog posts following the content templates and brand voice rules. Save posts to ~/OneDrive/Desktop/argo-blog/src/content/blog/. Run argo-seo-review on each post to validate brand voice and SEO checklist. Update content-queue.json with new entries (status: pending_review). Update keyword-research.json statuses.

jobs.name: argo-seo-programmatic-batch
jobs.description: Generate batch of 10 programmatic pages (city, niche, comparison, integration)

payload.message: Run argo-seo-programmatic to generate a batch of 10 programmatic pages. Read cities.json, niches.json, competitors.json, and integrations.json from ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/argo-seo-programmatic/references/. Prioritize: city pages first (until all 120+ done), then niche pages, then comparison pages. Generate Markdown with 60% templated structure + 40% unique content. Save to ~/OneDrive/Desktop/argo-blog/src/content/pages/. Run argo-seo-review on each. City/niche pages auto-approve if they pass checks. Comparison pages go to pending_review.

jobs.name: argo-seo-serp-daily
jobs.description: Daily SERP position check for target photography CRM keywords

payload.message: Run argo-seo-intel for daily SERP monitoring. Read serp-targets.json from ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/argo-seo-intel/references/. For each high-priority keyword, search Google via browser and record Argo's position (if found in top 100). Save results to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/serp-snapshots/ with filename YYYY-MM-DD.json. Note any significant position changes (up or down 5+ spots). Announce summary.

jobs.name: argo-seo-competitor-weekly
jobs.description: Weekly competitor changelog and content gap analysis

payload.message: Run argo-seo-intel for weekly competitor tracking. Read competitor-urls.json from ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/argo-seo-intel/references/. Visit each competitor homepage and pricing page via browser. Compare against previous snapshots and log changes to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/competitor-changelog.json. Identify content gaps — topics competitors cover that Argo's blog hasn't addressed yet. Announce findings.

jobs.name: argo-seo-authority-weekly
jobs.description: Weekly authority building: HARO pitch drafts and Reddit answer drafts

payload.message: Run argo-seo-authority. Check target subreddits (from reddit-subreddits.json) via browser for recent posts where photography business tools, CRM recommendations, or workflow advice is discussed. Draft 2-3 helpful Reddit comment drafts that naturally reference Argo where relevant. Draft 1-2 HARO-style pitch templates for photography/small business queries. Save all drafts to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/authority-outbox.json with status 'pending_review'. NEVER auto-post or auto-send anything. Announce drafts for review.

jobs.name: argo-seo-aeo-monthly
jobs.description: Monthly AI Overview monitoring and citation audit

payload.message: Run argo-seo-aeo for monthly AEO audit. Search target keywords via browser and check if Google AI Overviews cite any Argo blog content. Audit existing blog posts for AEO readiness: check for definitive answer paragraphs after H2s, FAQ sections, Q&A structure. Identify posts that need AEO improvements. Save audit results to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/reports/aeo-audit-YYYY-MM.json. Announce findings and recommendations.

jobs.name: argo-seo-report-weekly
jobs.description: Weekly SEO performance report with content stats and SERP trends

payload.message: Generate a weekly SEO report. Read all data from ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/: content-log.json (published content this week), content-queue.json (pending reviews), serp-snapshots/ (SERP position trends), competitor-changelog.json (competitor changes), authority-outbox.json (outreach status). Compile into a report: total pages published, pages pending review, SERP position changes, competitor activity, authority outreach status. Save to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/reports/seo-weekly-YYYY-WW.md. Announce summary.

jobs.name: argo-seo-foundation-monthly
jobs.description: Monthly technical SEO re-audit and Core Web Vitals check

payload.message: Run argo-seo-foundation for monthly technical SEO audit. Check blog.argostudio.co via browser: verify robots.txt accessible, sitemap-index.xml valid, llms.txt accessible. Sample 5 pages and verify: canonical URLs present, OG tags complete, JSON-LD valid, page load under 3s. Run Lighthouse audit if available. Check for broken internal links. Save audit results to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/reports/tech-seo-audit-YYYY-MM.md. Announce findings and any issues.

jobs.name: argo-seo-overseer
jobs.description: Daily health check of the entire Argo SEO automation system — monitors cron jobs, content pipeline, data freshness, and flags issues

payload.message: Run argo-seo-overseer to perform the daily health check. Read ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json for all job states. Read run logs from ~/.openclaw/cron/runs/ for recent run details. Read all SEO data files from ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/ (keyword-research.json, keyword-candidates.json, content-queue.json, content-log.json, competitor-changelog.json, authority-outbox.json). Check serp-snapshots/ and reports/ directories for data freshness. Count blog posts in ~/OneDrive/Desktop/argo-blog/src/content/blog/. Generate a structured health report with alerts, job status table, pipeline stats, and data freshness. Save the report to ~/.openclaw/workspace/argo-data/seo/reports/overseer-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Announce the full report.
